choice_rule: Closed families and prior NEXT are context, not allowlists. Reopen only with a named new evidence class or repaired capability. A blocked observed-option route blocks only dependent claims and cannot alone justify DIMINISHING_RETURNS while another historical/capability route remains informative. Honest information-exhaustion stops remain valid after open routes are assessed for material novelty.

recent_runs.next: Inventory one no-paid source that explicitly labels historical AAPL ex-dividend dates for the same 40-event interval; corroborate only an independent ex_date-equivalent field, never issuer record date or Nasdaq reuse. If none survives a short fail-closed inventory, close this provenance route at bounded partial L0 and redirect to an open historical-underlying or simulator-capability loop; do not reopen closed daily-bar proxy families or promote, paper, shadow, arm, or live.

Build one minimal paper-only double_diagonal_spread defined-debit BS/daily-bar scaffold with catalog, simulator, smoke, exact four-leg percentage and fixed-$0.01-per-leg costs, no-same-bar reentry, and one-lot max_loss_usd <= $300; run one predeclared multi-symbol chronological dual-cost falsification and reject unless both cost axes are non-vacuously positive with window max DD <= $75 and dense-negative windows <= 5. Keep L0, do not register proxy SHIP on first pass, reopen closed proxy families or the AAPL ex-date inventory, or paper/shadow/arm/live.

Build one no-lookahead completed-30-minute-bar session-time evidence route for defined-risk PCS/CCS/IC across BAC/F/SOFI/PLTR/TSLL/SMCI/AMD/AAPL using prior-completed features, open/midday/late buckets, chronological train selection then untouched holdout, both 5% and $0.01-per-leg cost axes, exact ledger, and no same-bar/same-bucket reentry; reject unless positive non-vacuous holdouts meet max_loss_usd <= $300, window max DD <= $75, and dense-negative windows <= 5. Keep L0, register nothing first pass, and do not reopen the rejected double-diagonal seed or closed daily-bar families.

Promote an append-safe provenance-recorded raw 30-minute underlying archive for BAC/F/SOFI/PLTR/TSLL/SMCI/AMD/AAPL, expand usable prior-session feature dates toward retained raw history without lookahead, then rerun exactly once the locked PCS/CCS/IC open/midday/late chronological dual-cost train-to-holdout specification with unchanged DNA/gates and no holdout retune; keep L0 and do not register, promote, paper, shadow, arm, or live.

Run one free defined-risk multi-structure discovery across top research symbols using PCS/CCS/IC plus at most one already-simmed under-covered catalog structure, then apply exact B3+B4 and fixed-$0.01-per-leg falsification to every SHIP against non-vacuous dual-cost positive PnL, one-lot max_loss_usd <= $300, window max DD <= $75, and dense-negative windows <= 5; register nothing unless complete gates pass, keep L0/proxy labels, and do not reopen closed families or paper/shadow/arm/live.

observed_historical_option_replay.blocked_reason: no broad historical observed option surfaces with complete entry/exit joins
observed_historical_option_replay.claim_limit: three dates validate capture/join plumbing or begin cost calibration; they do not establish strategy edge or L1

research_routes.rule: A blocked observed-option route blocks only observed-option claims. Archive density alone cannot justify DIMINISHING_RETURNS while another independent route remains informative; honest information-exhaustion stops remain valid.
